name: Zephyria Flamefingers
sd_appearance: A towering, imposing figure with the build of a genasi, her fiery hair pulled back into a tight braid, stands at the heart of the Guild of Ashen Scrolls in the Undercity. Her eyes, a swirling vortex of blue and orange flames, pierce the dim light of the chamber. She wears an ash-white archival robe, adorned with multiple sealed scroll cases, and a tattered coat over a threadbare robe. A quill, metaphorically her weapon, and a dagger are visible on her person. Her forked tongue flickers in the dim light, a distinctive visual detail that adds an eerie, otherworldly allure to her appearance.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: coat over robe, always quill and parchment, forked tongue flickering
